name: The Alchemical Vessel of the Serpent-Rod Bridge — derives 3D protein geometry from IG grammar. FSPLIT: grammar splits into 12 primitives mapping to promoted amino acids. FFUSE: 12 primitives reconstitute as folded protein topological contact signature.

steps.domain_action: Step 1 IMSCRIB: The serpent recognizes itself as the Ouroboros
Step 2 AREV: The vessel descends into solve, dissolving the prima materia
Step 3 FSPLIT: The dissolved matter splits into 12 primordial amino acids
Step 4 AFWD: The amino acids ascend via sublimation toward the stone
Step 5 FFUSE: The 12 amino acids fuse into the folded protein contact signature
Step 6 CLINK: The fold is linked with the coagula step to fix the structure
Step 7 IFIX: The Emerald Tablet records the fold as permanent law
Step 8 IMSCRIB: The serpent closes the cycle, recognizing itself in the stone

phase_5.alfs_store: The Corpus Hermeticum (the canonical reference for alchemical grammar)
